features: 【6 Pack Face Masks Skincare】Each of our face mask are made with nature extract offering a variety of care options for your skin. Brightening, deep cleaning, moisturizing, rejuvenating, repairing, soothing. Meet your daily needs for hydrating and moisturizing.

Gold proportion essence are non-sticky and instantly hydrates and refreshes.
